addLiquidity(uint256,uint256).details: First deposit sets the price ratio. Subsequent deposits must      preserve the existing ratio (excess is refunded off-chain).

setFeeBeneficiary(address).details: Called after deployment once the splitter is known.

params.amountIn: Exact amount of tokenIn to swap.

addLiquidity(uint256,uint256).notice: Deposit tokenA and tokenB to provide liquidity.

getAmountOut(address,uint256).notice: Get output amount for a given input (read-only price query).

setFeeBeneficiary(address).notice: Set the UBI fee beneficiary (UBIFeeSplitter address).

spotPrice().notice: Return current spot price of tokenA denominated in tokenB.         Returns 18-decimal fixed point. E.g. 3000e18 = 3000 tokenB per tokenA.
